short_summary: Iran deal confusion, China espionage arrest
rationale: China arresting a US academic at a conference is a fresh escalation in US-China tensions with direct implications for Americans abroad and bilateral relations; Iran deal contradictions continue.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: A new arrest of a US citizen by China on espionage charges escalates bilateral tensions and raises real concerns for Americans traveling or working in China.

top_events.title: Trump disputes leaked Iran ceasefire terms; Tehran says nothing finalized
top_events.summary: Continued contradictory signals on Iran deal keep Middle East uncertainty elevated, with potential oil market and US military posture implications for American consumers.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating US consulate attack
top_events.summary: A new development in the US consulate attack investigation — a Canadian officer shot — signals ongoing security threat around US diplomatic facilities in North America.
